description: VAL-ALIGN-001: Config loads, VAL-ALIGN-002: Single-GPU, VAL-ALIGN-003: No critic

commands: uv run pytest 03_alignment/tests/test_config.py -v -k 'openrlhf_compatible or to_dict_round_trip or load_json' → 3 passed
uv run pytest 03_alignment/tests/test_config.py -v -k 'single_gpu or multi_gpu or tensor_parallel' → 4 passed
uv run pytest 03_alignment/tests/test_config.py -v -k 'no_critic or use_critic' → 2 passed

tests: test_to_dict_round_trip: Config -> dict -> Config round-trip preserves values
test_load_json_round_trip: Config -> JSON file -> Config round-trip

test_openrlhf_compatible_structure: Config has top-level keys (model, algorithm, hardware, optimizer, use_critic) and algorithm keys (kl_coeff, clip_range, clip_range_low, clip_range_high, normalize_advantage, norm_adv_batch)
VAL-ALIGN-001.observations: ReinforcePPPipelineConfig is a dataclass that serializes to dict/JSON/YAML. Config.to_dict() produces a dict with all required OpenRLHF-compatible keys. Round-trip serialization preserves all values.

tests: test_default_single_gpu: HardwareConfig defaults to n_gpus=1, tensor_parallel_size=1
test_single_gpu_config: ReinforcePPPipelineConfig defaults to single GPU
VAL-ALIGN-002.observations: HardwareConfig enforces n_gpus=1 and tensor_parallel_size=1 via __post_init__ validation. Attempting to set multi-GPU or tensor-parallel raises ValueError. Memory budget defaults to 24GB.

VAL-ALIGN-003.observations: ReinforcePPPipelineConfig.__post_init__ raises ValueError when use_critic=True. Pipeline class asserts not self.config.use_critic. No critic_model or value_model attribute exists in ReinforcePPPipeline.
